## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check agentix/ tests/` passes locally
- [ ] `mypy agentix/ --ignore-missing-imports` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest tests/ -v` passes locally
- [ ] I have added or updated tests for the changes I made
- [ ] I have not hardcoded any secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
